payload.task: Implement semantic face parsing authority for TRK-W70-0144 / ITEM-W70-0144.

findings: Active Wave70 source image exists and was used for the blocker panel.
No local checkpoint proven to be a semantic face parsing model was found.
ControlNet Aux OneFormer/Uniformer entries are code/config routes, not proven face-region parsing with local weights.
SAM-style routes, when present, are promptable refinement routes and do not provide face-region semantic class labels by themselves.
MediaPipe can assist face landmarks but is not semantic face parsing for skin, hair, brows, eyes, nose, lips, mouth, neck, and background classes.
No canonical face-region polygons, parsing map, model confidence, or consensus metrics were exported.
No mask was changed or promoted.

payload.next_step: Resolve a compatible local semantic face parsing runtime/model or continue to the next model-backed authority row with exact local evidence.
